column7: Supports drought recovery; N application after rain events improves biomass restoration.
Improves drought variety establishment; phosphorus and potassium enhance root depth and drought tolerance.
Improves N retention in rainfed conditions; S component helps in post-drought recovery nutrition.
Improves drought tolerance; K regulates stomatal closure and reduces water loss under stress.
Brassinosteroid improves drought stress signaling; biostimulant compounds help plant recover faster after dry spells.
Humic acid improves water retention in drought-prone soils; algae extract promotes root depth for better water access.
Organic compounds improve soil moisture retention; root exudate mix enhances water use efficiency in drought-prone areas.
Azolla grown in bunded areas before dry season; organic N reserves support drought variety during early growth.
Foliar NPK applied after rain events maximizes drought variety recovery; water-soluble nutrients support rapid biomass restoration.
